Package org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources

Class LogsResource

java.lang.Object
jakarta.servlet.GenericServlet
jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServlet
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.RestServlet
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet.BasicRestServlet
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.LogsResource
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.servlet.Servlet, jakarta.servlet.ServletConfig, Serializable, BasicUniversalConfig, DefaultConfig, DefaultHtmlConfig
public class LogsResource extends BasicRestServlet
REST resource for viewing and accessing log files.

  • Method Details

    • deleteFile

      public org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.LogsResource.RedirectToRoot deleteFile(@Path("/*") String path) throws MethodNotAllowed
      Deletes a log file on the file system.
      Parameters:
      path - The file path.
      Returns:
      Redirect to root on success.
      Throws:
      MethodNotAllowed - If deletes are not enabled.

    • downloadFile

      public org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources.LogsResource.FileContents downloadFile(RestResponse res, @Path("/*") String path) throws NotFound, MethodNotAllowed
      Downloads the contents of a file.
      Parameters:
      res - The response.
      path - The file path.
      Returns:
      The file contents stream.
      Throws:
      NotFound - If the file is not found.
      MethodNotAllowed - If method not allowed.

    • getFile

      public LogsResource.FileResource getFile(RestRequest req, @Path("/*") String path) throws NotFound, Exception
      Returns information about the specified file or directory.
      Parameters:
      req - The request.
      path - The file path.
      Returns:
      The file or directory details.
      Throws:
      NotFound - If the file is not found.
      Exception - If an error occurs.

    • init

      public void init(Config config)
      Initializes log directory and formatter from config.
      Parameters:
      config - The microservice configuration.

    • viewFile

      public void viewFile(RestResponse res, @Path("/*") String path, @Query(name="highlight",schema=@Schema(d="Add severity color highlighting.")) boolean highlight, @Query(name="start",schema=@Schema(d="Start timestamp (ISO8601, full or partial).\nDon\'t print lines logged before the specified timestamp.\nUse any of the following formats: yyyy, yyyy-MM, yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-ddThh, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss.SSS")) String start, @Query(name="end",schema=@Schema(d="End timestamp (ISO8601, full or partial).\nDon\'t print lines logged after the specified timestamp.\nUse any of the following formats: yyyy, yyyy-MM, yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-ddThh, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss.SSS")) String end, @Query(name="thread",schema=@Schema(d="Thread name filter.\nOnly show log entries with the specified thread name.")) String thread, @Query(name="loggers",schema=@Schema(d="Logger filter (simple class name).\nOnly show log entries if they were produced by one of the specified loggers.")) String[] loggers, @Query(name="severity",schema=@Schema(d="Severity filter.\nOnly show log entries with the specified severity.")) String[] severity) throws NotFound, MethodNotAllowed, IOException
      Views the contents of a log file with optional filtering.
      Parameters:
      res - The response.
      path - The file path.
      highlight - Add severity color highlighting.
      start - Start timestamp filter.
      end - End timestamp filter.
      thread - Thread name filter.
      loggers - Logger filter.
      severity - Severity filter.
      Throws:
      NotFound - If the file is not found.
      MethodNotAllowed - If method not allowed.
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

    • viewParsedEntries

      public LogParser viewParsedEntries(RestRequest req, @Path("/*") String path, @Query(name="start",schema=@Schema(d="Start timestamp (ISO8601, full or partial).\nDon\'t print lines logged before the specified timestamp.\nUse any of the following formats: yyyy, yyyy-MM, yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-ddThh, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss.SSS")) String start, @Query(name="end",schema=@Schema(d="End timestamp (ISO8601, full or partial).\nDon\'t print lines logged after the specified timestamp.\nUse any of the following formats: yyyy, yyyy-MM, yyyy-MM-dd, yyyy-MM-ddThh, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss, yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm:ss.SSS")) String end, @Query(name="thread",schema=@Schema(d="Thread name filter.\nOnly show log entries with the specified thread name.")) String thread, @Query(name="loggers",schema=@Schema(d="Logger filter (simple class name).\nOnly show log entries if they were produced by one of the specified loggers.")) String[] loggers, @Query(name="severity",schema=@Schema(d="Severity filter.\nOnly show log entries with the specified severity.")) String[] severity) throws NotFound, IOException
      Views the parsed contents of a log file with filtering.
      Parameters:
      req - The request.
      path - The file path.
      start - Start timestamp filter.
      end - End timestamp filter.
      thread - Thread name filter.
      loggers - Logger filter.
      severity - Severity filter.
      Returns:
      The log parser iterable.
      Throws:
      NotFound - If the file is not found.
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.
